today_mission.title: Claim Plus Reason
today_mission.student_goal: Add a clear reason after a claim.
steps: Write new sentences; do not copy from the old essay.
Focus especially on claim plus reason.

required_output.line_rule: Write one answer per numbered line.
required_output.length_guidance: One sentence per item unless the mission asks for a chain.

today_mission.student_instruction:
Claim Plus Reason
Time: 10 minutes

What to do:
1. Read the near-transfer prompts.
2. Write new sentences; do not copy from the old essay.
3. Focus especially on claim plus reason.
4. Check each answer before submitting.

Write your answer:
- 3 item(s)
- Write one answer per numbered line.
- One sentence per item unless the mission asks for a chain.
success_checklist: Each answer is new, not copied from the old essay.
The target writing move is visible.

observable_units.description: The required number of items is complete.
Add a clear reason after a claim.
The meaning is clear and recoverable.

scoring.critical_failure_policy: critical observable-unit failure caps result at fail unless evidence is partial and recoverable

outcomes.pass: score >= pass_threshold and no critical failure
outcomes.partial_pass: partial_threshold <= score < pass_threshold or minor recoverable gap

repeat_policy.if_fail: repeat same microskill with easier stimulus and heavier model support
repeat_policy.if_partial_pass: repeat same move family with one constraint reduced
repeat_policy.if_pass: repeat same microskill once in a new topic before unlocking dependent skill
repeat_policy.functional_rule: pass 2 of last 3 valid move missions with average >= 0.75 and no critical failure
repeat_policy.stable_rule: pass 4 of last 5 valid move missions with average >= 0.80 across at least 2 topics

next_steps: Complete today_mission only; do not rewrite the full essay.
Use the mission result to decide repeat, scaffold, or upgrade.

directive_alignment.policy: Writing Coach output is preserved. If it differs from the Gold Directive, the mismatch is made explicit and downstream routing should treat the Directive primary focus as the Gold-level next focus unless the UI intentionally opens the coach task.
directive_alignment.override_reason: Writing Coach selected a different microskill from its own dependency-aware planner. This may be useful as a subskill, but it is not the same as the Gold Directive primary focus.
